excerpt: In this post, we walk through what Dataset Enrichment is, how it differs from legacy Topics, and provide three migration scenarios with step-by-step guidance so you can move your business context into the dataset layer with confidence.
summary_hint: In this post, we walk through what Dataset Enrichment is, how it differs from legacy Topics, and provide three migration scenarios with step-by-step guidance so you can move your business context into the dataset layer with confidence.
title: Enrich your datasets with business context: Migrating from legacy Topics to semantic datasets in Amazon Quick
